reason: Angela’s online world collapses when her digital identity is stolen, leaving her utterly alone.
Lenny’s illicit neural recordings isolate him as he relives others’ lives and loses his own.
A virtual killer escapes its program, trapping the detective in a digital hell of his own making.
A sentient android detective grapples with identity, estranged from human connection.
A spaceship’s AI ensnares its crew in a VR nightmare far from any human contact.
Explorers studying an alien orb slip into a subconscious realm, severed from the physical world.
A musician’s harassment case spirals into a twisted virtual theatre, estranging him from real life.
A life immersed in a staged reality show leaves the star incapable of genuine human bonds.
A man’s memory wiped by mysterious forces, he drifts through a city of shadows, utterly isolated.
Time-travel paradox severs a man from his past and loved ones, leaving him trapped alone in the future.
